name: RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-9
title: SKILL.md and spec.md never mention reading docs/spec/contract.md as part of Step 1
description: SKILL.md Step 1 and spec.md only mention reading the feature spec and existing implementation files. However, contract.md often contains the interface contract between the feature and its consumers. When authoring a spec update, failing to read contract.md can lead to spec changes that violate the declared contract. Fix: add docs/spec/contract.md as a recommended Step 1 read target alongside spec.md.
